transcripts.title: V08 — Light & Dark
transcripts.description: Verify dark nocturnal exhibit and flashlight illumination

commands.output:
Family Zoo
By Sharpee Tutorial

Type HELP for instructions.

Taken.
commands.comment: Get the keycard and unlock the staff gate

commands.output:
Main Path

A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo. Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside the path. To the east, the petting zoo. To the west, the aviary. A staff gate blocks the path to the south. The entrance is back to the north.

You can see staff gate, direction signs, flower beds, souvenir penny, park bench, lunchbox here.
commands.comment: V8 teaches: isDark rooms, LightSourceTrait, SwitchableTrait

commands.output: You unlock staff gate with staff keycard.

Supply Room

A cluttered storage room behind the staff gate. Metal shelves line the walls, stacked with bags of feed, cleaning supplies, and spare parts for the exhibits. A cork board on the wall is covered with staff schedules. A heavy door to the south leads to the nocturnal exhibit. The staff gate leads back north.

You can see metal shelves, cork board, flashlight here.
It is pitch dark. You are likely to be eaten by a grue.
It's pitch dark, and you can't see a thing.

Supply Room

A cluttered storage room behind the staff gate. Metal shelves line the walls, stacked with bags of feed, cleaning supplies, and spare parts for the exhibits. A cork board on the wall is covered with staff schedules. A heavy door to the south leads to the nocturnal exhibit. The staff gate leads back north.

You can see metal shelves, cork board here.
commands.comment: Go back and switch on the flashlight

commands.output: The flashlight switches on, banishing the darkness.

Nocturnal Animals Exhibit

A cool, dimly lit cavern designed to simulate nighttime. Glass enclosures line both walls, each with a soft red light inside. You can see a family of sugar gliders leaping between branches, a pair of wide-eyed bush babies clinging to a rope, and an enormous barn owl perched motionless on a fake tree stump. The exit leads back north to the supply room.

You can see sugar gliders, bush babies, barn owl here.

Nocturnal Animals Exhibit

A cool, dimly lit cavern designed to simulate nighttime. Glass enclosures line both walls, each with a soft red light inside. You can see a family of sugar gliders leaping between branches, a pair of wide-eyed bush babies clinging to a rope, and an enormous barn owl perched motionless on a fake tree stump. The exit leads back north to the supply room.

You can see sugar gliders, bush babies, barn owl here.
commands.comment: With the flashlight on, we can see the animals!

commands.output: An enormous barn owl with a heart-shaped white face, perched motionless on a fake tree stump. It swivels its head to follow your movement with unsettling precision.
Two bush babies with impossibly large round eyes, clinging to a rope with tiny hands. They freeze and stare at you with an expression of perpetual surprise.

Supply Room

A cluttered storage room behind the staff gate. Metal shelves line the walls, stacked with bags of feed, cleaning supplies, and spare parts for the exhibits. A cork board on the wall is covered with staff schedules. A heavy door to the south leads to the nocturnal exhibit. The staff gate leads back north.

You can see metal shelves, cork board here.
